content: Key difference between shoe-makers inbox and intentional inbox: shoe-makers treats inbox messages as human-written instructions (agent acts then deletes); intentional treats inbox as raw conversational signal that gets triaged and distilled to Octowiki, with immutable archive in done/. shoe-makers has no triage concept. Intentional needs a triage skill that doesn't exist in shoe-makers yet.

provenance.raw_agent: The inbox prompt just tells the agent to read, act, and delete. There's no triage concept — it treats inbox messages as instructions, not as conversational signal to distil.
provenance.raw_user: we have octowiki and we have a model for behaviour tree in my repo ../shoemakers
